creator: tota@rtfm.jp
text:
Hi,

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I've improved the patch a bit.

diff -urN rubygem-ruby2ruby.orig/Makefile rubygem-ruby2ruby/Makefile
--- rubygem-ruby2ruby.orig/Makefile	2008-04-06 17:58:10.000000000 +0900
+++ rubygem-ruby2ruby/Makefile	2009-02-07 19:45:21.000000000 +0900
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=	ruby2ruby
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.8
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_RUBYFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	seattlerb
@@ -14,8 +14,8 @@
 MAINTAINER=	tota@rtfm.jp
 COMMENT=	A pure ruby code generator easily from ParseTree's Sexps

-BUILD_DEPENDS=	rubygem-parsetree>=0.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-parsetree \
-		rubygem-hoe>=1.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-hoe
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	rubygem-parsetree>=3.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-parsetree \
+		rubygem-hoe>=1.8.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-hoe
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}

 USE_RUBY=	yes
@@ -24,8 +24,8 @@
 x-generate-plist:
 	${ECHO} bin/r2r_show > pkg-plist.new
 	${ECHO} %%GEM_CACHE%% >> pkg-plist.new
-	${FIND} ${PREFIX}/${GEM_DOC_DIR} -type f | ${SED} -e
's,${PREFIX}/${GEM_DOC_DIR},%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%,' >> pkg-plist.new
-	${FIND} ${PREFIX}/${GEM_LIB_DIR} -type f | ${SED} -e
's,${PREFIX}/${GEM_LIB_DIR},%%GEM_LIB_DIR%%,' >> pkg-plist.new
+	${FIND} ${PREFIX}/${GEM_DOC_DIR} -type f | ${SORT} | ${SED} -e
's,${PREFIX}/${GEM_DOC_DIR},%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%,' >> pkg-plist.new
+	${FIND} ${PREFIX}/${GEM_LIB_DIR} -type f | ${SORT} | ${SED} -e
's,${PREFIX}/${GEM_LIB_DIR},%%GEM_LIB_DIR%%,' >> pkg-plist.new
 	${ECHO} %%GEM_SPEC%% >> pkg-plist.new
 	${FIND} ${PREFIX}/${GEM_LIB_DIR} -type d -depth | ${SED} -e
's,${PREFIX}/${GEM_LIB_DIR},@dirrm %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%,' >> pkg-plist.new
 	${FIND} ${PREFIX}/${GEM_DOC_DIR} -type d -depth | ${SED} -e
's,${PREFIX}/${GEM_DOC_DIR},@dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%,' >> pkg-plist.new
diff -urN rubygem-ruby2ruby.orig/distinfo rubygem-ruby2ruby/distinfo
--- rubygem-ruby2ruby.orig/distinfo	2008-01-09 11:31:45.000000000 +0900
+++ rubygem-ruby2ruby/distinfo	2009-02-07 17:23:05.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (rubygem/ruby2ruby-1.1.8.gem) = c39278f8a4c5a71285699177a84b5a34
-SHA256 (rubygem/ruby2ruby-1.1.8.gem) =
58a178b4a13c3b8e054ca0d5c73abbfa4b92ee111264ae03f4f1c578bb8807a1
-SIZE (rubygem/ruby2ruby-1.1.8.gem) = 13824
+MD5 (rubygem/ruby2ruby-1.2.2.gem) = 56baccf4118731bb0f882e450c25d8bf
+SHA256 (rubygem/ruby2ruby-1.2.2.gem) =
3c454baa947b7a71b3f927414ac37eddccd655ef2bb01cdd95b89be96cfc96ef
+SIZE (rubygem/ruby2ruby-1.2.2.gem) = 14336
diff -urN rubygem-ruby2ruby.orig/pkg-plist rubygem-ruby2ruby/pkg-plist
--- rubygem-ruby2ruby.orig/pkg-plist	2008-01-09 11:31:45.000000000 +0900
+++ rubygem-ruby2ruby/pkg-plist	2009-02-07 19:31:14.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,17 +1,13 @@
 bin/r2r_show
 %%GEM_CACHE%%
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/rdoc-style.css
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/lib/ruby2ruby_rb.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/History_txt.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/Manifest_txt.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/README_txt.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Proc.src/M000001.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Proc.src/M000002.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Proc.src/M000003.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/ProcStoreTmp.src/M000004.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Method.src/M000005.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Method.src/M000006.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Method.src/M000007.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000001.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000002.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000003.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000004.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000005.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000006.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000007.html
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000008.html
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000009.html
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000010.html
@@ -100,30 +96,16 @@
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000093.html
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000094.html
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000095.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000096.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000097.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000098.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000099.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000100.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000101.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000102.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000103.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000104.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000105.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000106.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000107.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src/M000108.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/UnboundMethod.src/M000109.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Proc.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/ProcStoreTmp.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Method.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/UnboundMethod.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/fr_file_index.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/created.rid
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/History_txt.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/Manifest_txt.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/README_txt.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/lib/ruby2ruby_rb.html
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/fr_class_index.html
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/fr_file_index.html
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/fr_method_index.html
 %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/index.html
-%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/created.rid
+%%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/rdoc-style.css
 %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%/.autotest
 %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%/History.txt
 %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%/Manifest.txt
@@ -139,11 +121,7 @@
 @dirrm %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%
 @dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files/lib
 @dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/files
-@dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Proc.src
-@dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/ProcStoreTmp.src
-@dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Method.src
 @dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/Ruby2Ruby.src
-@dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes/UnboundMethod.src
 @dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc/classes
 @dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%/rdoc
 @dirrm %%GEM_DOC_DIR%%

Regards,
